text: IRGC: Managing and controlling the Strait of Hormuz is an inevitable strategic priority for Iran.
text_zh: 伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队：管理和控制霍尔木兹海峡是伊朗不可避免的战略优先事项。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 The Israeli military says it killed alleged Hamas members who took part in the 7 October attacks, including a Hamas platoon commander, and a member of Hamas’s military intelligence unit during operations in Gaza this week. The killed fighters were identified as Khazem Rami Ali Aidi (participated in the October 7 attack), Maher Tantawi (Hamas military intelligence), and Ibrahim Mansour (Hamas platoon commander). @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 以色列军方称，本周在加沙的行动中，击毙了据称参与了10月7日袭击的哈马斯成员，其中包括一名哈马斯排长和一名哈马斯军事情报部门成员。被击毙的武装人员身份确认为：Khazem Rami Ali Aidi（参与了10月7日袭击）、Maher Tantawi（哈马斯军事情报部门）和Ibrahim Mansour（哈马斯排长）。@wfwitness

text: Pakistan has become central to U.S.–Iran talks after appealing directly to Trump, who extended the ceasefire. Trump’s view of Pakistan appears highly positive. According to officials, “Trump loves winners, and he’s impressed.” He was reportedly struck by Pakistan’s military and performance, saying, “Who are these Pakistanis? It’s a small country… they’ve clobbered the Indians.” Source: The Hill
text_zh: 巴基斯坦在直接向特朗普呼吁并延长停火协议后，已成为美伊会谈的核心。特朗普对巴基斯坦的看法似乎非常积极。据官员称，“特朗普喜欢赢家，他印象深刻。”据报道，他对巴基斯坦的军事和表现感到震惊，称：“这些巴基斯坦人是谁？这是一个小国……他们把印度人打得落花流水。”来源：国会山报

text: Personally, if a wanted individual is a drug trafficker, a murderer, or a high-profile thief, I believe they should never be allowed to be free I have never once attacked the army, regardless of the methods they used. Yet, I do not recall Speaker Berri stepping forward to defend those wanted individuals, nor did he rise up in protest as the young men. Are we to understand, then, that you only want the State to apply to a specific sect, against the Shia only you sons of 60 whores
text_zh: 就我个人而言，如果一名被通缉的人员是毒贩、杀人犯或高调的窃贼，我认为他们绝不应该被允许获得自由。无论军队使用什么手段，我从未攻击过军队。然而，我不记得贝里议长曾站出来为那些被通缉的人辩护，他也没有像年轻人那样起来抗议。那么我们是否可以理解为，你只希望国家针对特定教派，只针对什叶派？你们这些60个妓女的儿子。

text: I hate Lebanon and hate my fellow Lebanese that's why I don't like to post about internal politics a lot but here is one post Today Lebanese State security went to Sunni Neighborhoods in Beirut to arrest someone who was gauging price and forming a monopoly. He was arrested Everyone from the Sunni Lebanese PM to Sunni MPs in the parliament to the literal Mufti of Lebanon (Sunni) issued condemnation and protected the criminal. They vowed to arrest the criminal? No, they vowed to arrest the Lebanese state security personnel doing their job. On the other hand...there north in Baalbek and Beqaa Some time ago, the army launched a raid in Baalbek; they struck wanted individuals multiple times using airstrikes—a tactic they were employing for the first time—killing them in the process. Airstrikes against Lebanese Shia. They also raided homes, destroyed gathering halls, and opened fire on families. The Lebanese army even demolished houses in that area.
text_zh: 我讨厌黎巴嫩，也讨厌我的黎巴嫩同胞，这就是为什么我不喜欢发布太多关于内部政治的内容，但这里有一条帖子。今天，黎巴嫩国家安全局前往贝鲁特的逊尼派社区，逮捕了一名哄抬物价和搞垄断的人。他被捕了。从逊尼派黎巴嫩总理到议会中的逊尼派议员，再到黎巴嫩的穆夫提（逊尼派），每个人都发表了谴责并保护了这名罪犯。他们发誓要逮捕罪犯吗？不，他们发誓要逮捕执行公务的黎巴嫩国家安全人员。另一方面……在北部的巴勒贝克和贝卡，前段时间，军队在巴勒贝克发动了突袭；他们多次使用空袭打击被通缉的人员——这是他们首次采用的战术——并在过程中杀死了他们。针对黎巴嫩什叶派的空袭。他们还突袭了民宅，摧毁了聚会大厅，并向家庭开火。黎巴嫩军队甚至拆毁了该地区的房屋。

text: Trump sends a DM to a New York Post reporter who is in Islamabad: Come home!!!
text_zh: 特朗普给一名身在伊斯兰堡的《纽约邮报》记者发了私信：回家！！！

text: ⭕️ Hezbullah released footage of the attack that shot down the Israeli Hermes-450 drone that was violating the ceasefire and the Lebanese sovereignty The drone that killed many of our brothers and sisters by burning them to death The drone that destroyed many of our houses
text_zh: ⭕️ 真主党发布了击落以色列赫尔墨斯-450无人机的袭击视频，该无人机当时正在违反停火协议并侵犯黎巴嫩主权。这架无人机曾通过将我们的许多兄弟姐妹活活烧死而杀害了他们，这架无人机摧毁了我们的许多房屋。

text: Large scale Israeli demolition of civilian houses in Taybeh town. The most documented war crime in this century and no one is doing anything
text_zh: 以色列在泰贝镇大规模拆毁民房。这是本世纪记录最详尽的战争罪行，却没有人采取任何行动。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇵🇸 Polling stations have opened across parts of the Israeli-occupied West Bank and central Gaza, including Deir el-Balah, as Palestinians vote in municipal elections held for the first time since the Gaza war. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇵🇸 Approximately 1.3 million Palestinians are voting in local authority elections in the West Bank for the first time in five years, and for the first time in 20 years in Deir al‑Balah in the central Gaza Strip. Palestinian President Mahmoud Abbas voted in Al‑Bireh, near Ramallah, and said that November elections for the Palestinian National Council will be held, stressing that Gaza is an integral part of a future Palestinian state. Hamas and Fatah representatives recently held rare meetings in Gaza to discuss differences. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇵🇸 随着巴勒斯坦人在加沙战争以来的首次市政选举中投票，以色列占领的西岸部分地区和加沙中部（包括代尔巴拉赫）的投票站已经开放。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇵🇸 约130万巴勒斯坦人正在西岸参加地方当局选举，这是五年来首次，也是加沙地带中部代尔巴拉赫20年来的首次。巴勒斯坦总统马哈茂德·阿巴斯在拉马拉附近的阿尔比雷投票，并表示将于11月举行巴勒斯坦全国委员会选举，强调加沙是未来巴勒斯坦国不可分割的一部分。哈马斯和法塔赫代表最近在加沙举行了罕见的会议，讨论分歧。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi described his visit to Pakistan as “very fruitful”, valuing Pakistan’s good offices and brotherly efforts to restore peace to the region. Araghchi said he shared Iran’s position on a workable framework to permanently end the war, adding: “We have yet to see if the U.S. is truly serious about diplomacy.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 伊朗外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格希称他对比基斯坦的访问“非常有成效”，重视巴基斯坦为恢复该地区和平所做的斡旋和兄弟般的努力。阿拉格希表示，他分享了伊朗关于永久结束战争的可行框架的立场，并补充说：“我们还有待观察美国是否真的认真对待外交。” @wfwitness

text: Viktor Orbán will step back from parliament after losing the April 12 election, ending 16 years in power. He said he’s not needed in parliament but will focus on reorganizing his party, Fidesz.
text_zh: 维克多·欧尔班在4月12日的选举中失利后将退出议会，结束其16年的执政。他表示议会不再需要他，但他将专注于重组他的政党——青民盟。

text: Faytuks News The New York Post's reporter in Islamabad being told to "come home" by Trump https://twitter.com/CaitlinDoornbos/status/2048076879312089514/photo/1 - Caitlin Doornbos tweet
text_zh: Faytuks News 《纽约邮报》驻伊斯兰堡记者被特朗普告知“回家” https://twitter.com/CaitlinDoornbos/status/2048076879312089514/photo/1 - Caitlin Doornbos 推文

text: Disclose.tv JUST IN - Trump says he has cancelled U.S. representatives going to Islamabad to meet with the Iranians. https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2048078011447071062/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 最新消息 - 特朗普称他已取消美国代表团前往伊斯兰堡与伊朗人会面的计划。https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2048078011447071062/photo/1 推文

text: Faytuks News https://twitter.com/Faytuks/status/2048076807270748218/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Faytuks News https://twitter.com/Faytuks/status/2048076807270748218/photo/1 推文

text: Trump: I just cancelled the trip of my representatives going is Islamabad, Pakistan, to meet with the Iranians. Too much time wasted on traveling, too much work! Besides which, there is tremendous infighting and confusion within their “leadership.” Nobody knows who is in charge, including them. Also, we have all the cards, they have none! If they want to talk, all they have to do is call!!!
text_zh: 特朗普：我刚刚取消了我的代表团前往巴基斯坦伊斯兰堡与伊朗人会面的行程。浪费了太多时间在旅行上，工作太多了！此外，他们的“领导层”内部存在巨大的内斗和混乱。没人知道谁负责，包括他们自己。而且，我们掌握了所有的牌，他们一张都没有！如果他们想谈，他们只需要打电话！！！

text: Nuno Felix RT @lisaabramowicz1 : The world’s oil buffers are rapidly being depleted, with crude inventories poised to reach the lowest levels on record even if the Strait of Hormuz reopens in full by the end of this month: GS’s Daan Struyven & team https://twitter.com/lisaabramowicz1/status/2048031066535903439/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转推 @lisaabramowicz1：全球石油缓冲储备正在迅速耗尽，即使霍尔木兹海峡在本月底前全面重新开放，原油库存也将达到历史最低水平：高盛的 Daan Struyven 及其团队 https://twitter.com/lisaabramowicz1/status/2048031066535903439/photo/1 推文

text: Michael A. Horowitz RT @aishahhasnie : 🚨 BREAKING: President Trump just told me over the phone he has unilaterally cancelled Witkoff and Kushner’s trip to Pakistan to meet with the Iranians. "I've told my people a little while ago they were getting ready to leave, and I said, 'Nope, you're not making an 18 hour flight to go there. We have all the cards. They can call us anytime they want, but you're not going to be making any more 18 hour flights to sit around talking about nothing'." tweet
text_zh: Michael A. Horowitz 转推 @aishahhasnie：🚨 突发：特朗普总统刚刚在电话中告诉我，他已单方面取消了威特科夫和库什纳前往巴基斯坦与伊朗人会面的行程。“我刚才告诉我的团队，他们正准备出发，我说，‘不，你们不用坐18小时的飞机去那里。我们掌握了所有的牌。他们随时可以打电话给我们，但你们不用再坐18小时的飞机去那里坐着谈论毫无意义的事情了’。” 推文

text: OSINTdefender Barak Ravid of Axios also received a call from U.S. President Donald J. Trump on the cancellation of the U.S. delegation’s trip to Pakistan. When asked if this meant a resumption of the war against Iran the president said “No. That doesn't mean that. We haven't thought about it yet.” tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender Axios 的巴拉克·拉维德也接到了美国总统唐纳德·J·特朗普关于取消美国代表团巴基斯坦之行的电话。当被问及这是否意味着恢复对伊朗的战争时，总统说：“不。并不意味着那样。我们还没考虑过。” 推文

text: Nuno Felix Some dude in Australia…… This image is perfectly emblematic of the modern West. Weak men, seated in the ruins of a civilisation built by better men. - IMPERATOR tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 澳大利亚的某个家伙……这张照片完美地象征了现代西方。软弱的男人，坐在由更优秀的人建立的文明废墟中。 - IMPERATOR 推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @Dakasr2 : 🇩🇪 🇱🇹 Panzerbrigade 45 "Litauen" is more than just equipment or drills. ​It’s thousands of soldiers arriving not for a short rotation, but as a permanent part of NATO’s eastern flank defense. And it’s not just Germans - other NATO allies train side by side with them, building real combat strength. This shift is already changing everyday life here in Lithuania: from a stronger focus on German language studies to plans for an international school and deeper ties with local communities. ​This isn’t just a deployment anymore - it’s integration. These are people who will live, work and defend this land alongside us 🤝 🛡️ ​ #Panzerbrigade45 #Bundeswehr #Lithuania Video 🎬 brigadelitauen /IG tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转推 @Dakasr2：🇩🇪 🇱🇹 第45“立陶宛”装甲旅不仅仅是装备或演习。这是数千名士兵的到来，不是为了短期轮换，而是作为北约东翼防御的永久组成部分。而且不仅仅是德国人——其他北约盟国也与他们并肩训练，建立真正的战斗力。这种转变已经改变了立陶宛的日常生活：从更注重德语学习到建立国际学校和加强与当地社区的联系的计划。这不再仅仅是部署——这是融合。这些人将与我们一起生活、工作并保卫这片土地 🤝 🛡️ #Panzerbrigade45 #Bundeswehr #Lithuania 视频 🎬 brigadelitauen /IG 推文

text: Nuno Felix https://x.com/Dakasr2/status/2047967018964459986/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix https://x.com/Dakasr2/status/2047967018964459986/video/1 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Fars News Agency: The Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps, marking the anniversary of the U.S. defeat in Tabas and the more recent failure in Isfahan, warned that any new aggression will be met with a response beyond enemy expectations, at a strategic deterrent level. The IRGC claimed it has even prepared prisoner‑of‑war camps for potential invaders. The statement accused the U.S. of being manipulated by the “Zionist prime minister” and urged Washington to accept the reality of its destroyed regional bases and withdraw unconditionally. Iran reaffirmed its strategy of controlling the Strait of Hormuz, allowing commercial vessels of all countries except US, Israeli or affiliated ships. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 法尔斯通讯社：伊斯兰革命卫队在纪念美国在塔巴斯失败以及近期在伊斯法罕失败的周年之际警告称，任何新的侵略都将遭到超出敌人预期的战略威慑级别的回应。伊斯兰革命卫队声称，他们甚至为潜在的入侵者准备了战俘营。声明指责美国受到“犹太复国主义总理”的操纵，并敦促华盛顿接受其地区基地被摧毁的现实并无条件撤军。伊朗重申了其控制霍尔木兹海峡的战略，允许除美国、以色列或其附属船只以外的所有国家的商船通行。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump announced that he has cancelled the trip of his representatives to Islamabad, Pakistan, for talks with Iran. “Too much time wasted on travelling, too much work!” he wrote. Citing “tremendous infighting and confusion” within Iran’s leadership, he added: “Nobody knows who is in charge, including them. Also, we have all the cards, they have none! If they want to talk, all they have to do is call!!!” @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普宣布，他已取消其代表前往巴基斯坦伊斯兰堡与伊朗进行会谈的行程。他写道：“浪费了太多时间在旅行上，工作太多了！”他提到伊朗领导层内部存在“巨大的内斗和混乱”，并补充说：“没人知道谁在负责，包括他们自己。而且，我们掌握着所有的牌，他们一张都没有！如果他们想谈，他们只需要打个电话！！！”@wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 Chris reports from Iran: With some of the brave Iranian soldiers and police who DEFEATED the US operation in Isfahan. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 克里斯从伊朗发回报道：与一些在伊斯法罕击败美国行动的勇敢的伊朗士兵和警察在一起。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇸 ⚔️ 🇮🇷 US military bases and equipment across the Persian Gulf region suffered damage far worse than publicly acknowledged, with repairs expected to cost billions of dollars, according to NBC. ➡️ Iran hit dozens of targets across US bases in seven Middle East countries, striking warehouses, command HQs, aircraft hangars, satellite comms infrastructure, runways, high-end radar systems, and dozens of aircraft. ➡️ In the early days of the war, an Iranian F-5 fighter jet bombed Camp Buehring in Kuwait — despite the base having air defenses. It's described as the first time an enemy fixed-wing aircraft has struck a US military base in years. This is huge on its own — the F-5 is a 1960s-era aircraft, essentially obsolete by any modern standard. Iran got a fixed-wing strike through US air defenses with a plane that predates disco. ➡️ Iran used missiles, drones, and F-5 fighter jets — contradicting earlier US claims that the Iranian air force had failed to deploy fixed-wing aircraft against American targets. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚔️ 🇮🇷 据美国全国广播公司（NBC）报道，波斯湾地区各地的美军基地和装备遭受的损失远比公开承认的要严重，预计维修费用将高达数十亿美元。➡️ 伊朗袭击了中东七个国家的美军基地中的数十个目标，打击了仓库、指挥总部、飞机机库、卫星通信基础设施、跑道、高端雷达系统和数十架飞机。➡️ 在战争初期，一架伊朗F-5战斗机轰炸了科威特的布林营地——尽管该基地拥有防空系统。据称，这是多年来敌方固定翼飞机首次袭击美军基地。这本身就意义重大——F-5是20世纪60年代的飞机，按任何现代标准来看基本上都已经过时了。伊朗用一架早于迪斯科时代的飞机突破了美国的防空系统进行了固定翼打击。➡️ 伊朗使用了导弹、无人机和F-5战斗机——这与美国早先声称伊朗空军未能部署固定翼飞机打击美国目标的说法相矛盾。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah has released a statement: “In response to what it described as an Israeli ceasefire violation and attacks on civilians in Yahmur al-Shaqif, we targeted an Israeli military vehicle in Quneitra at 15:00, carrying out a successful strike and achieving a direct hit.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 真主党发表声明称：“针对以色列违反停火协议并袭击亚赫穆尔·沙基夫（Yahmur al-Shaqif）平民的行为，我们在15:00瞄准了库奈特拉的一辆以色列军车，成功实施了打击并直接命中。”@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Israeli forces claim they located a Hezbollah anti‑tank missile cache in southern Lebanon’s Shiite Ridge area. In Bint Jbeil, paratroopers and Yahalom unit engineers dismantled alleged structures used by Hezbollah for military purposes. Soldiers also allegedly found an underground shaft, Kalashnikov rifles, and explosive devices planted in a building and a vehicle. The IDF claimed that Hezbollah again violated the ceasefire by allegedly launching explosive drones at IDF troops south of the forward defence line near Qantara. The drones detonated near the soldiers; no Israeli injuries were reported. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列军队声称他们在黎巴嫩南部什叶派山脊地区发现了一个真主党反坦克导弹藏匿点。在宾特朱拜勒，伞兵和亚哈洛姆部队的工兵拆除了据称被真主党用于军事目的的建筑物。士兵们还据称发现了一个地下竖井、卡拉什尼科夫步枪，以及埋设在建筑物和车辆中的爆炸装置。以色列国防军声称，真主党再次违反停火协议，据称向坎塔拉附近前沿防御线以南的以军部队发射了爆炸无人机。无人机在士兵附近爆炸；没有以色列人员伤亡的报告。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 Fox News: U.S. President Trump has unilaterally cancelled the planned trip of envoys Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner to Pakistan for talks with Iran, a Fox News reporter said after speaking with the president. “I told my people a little while ago they…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump stated in a phone call with Axios that he canceled the trip by his envoys Witkoff and Kushner to Islamabad due to the Iranian position in the negotiations. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 福克斯新闻：美国总统特朗普单方面取消了特使史蒂夫·威特科夫和贾里德·库什纳前往巴基斯坦与伊朗进行会谈的计划，一位福克斯新闻记者在与总统交谈后表示。‘我刚才告诉我的团队，他们……’” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普在与Axios的通话中表示，由于伊朗在谈判中的立场，他取消了其特使威特科夫和库什纳前往伊斯兰堡的行程。 @wfwitness

text: 📝 Бои у канала Северский Донец — Донбасс 📝 На Славянском направлении продолжаются бои на подступах к Краматорской агломерации . Российские войска продавливают позиции ВСУ на обоих флангах направления, стремясь обойти основные укрепрайоны противника и опорные пункты, возведенные вдоль трассы М-03. ➡️ На рубеже Пискуновка — Кривая Лука идут столкновения за контроль над высотами и в окрестностях леса Долгий . Устойчивое закрепление там ВС РФ позволит накапливать малые штурмовые группы на подступах к Николаевке , а также обходить Рай-Александровку с севера. ➡️ В самой Рай-Александровке также идут бои. Украинские ресурсы распространяют панические сообщения о чуть ли не заходе ВС РФ в центр населенного пункта, однако объективных подтверждений этому пока нет. ➡️ На южном фланге малые штурмовые группы закрепляются в лесополосах у канала Северский Донец — Донбасс западнее Дибровы . Юрий Подоляка сообщает о начале боев за соседнюю Малиновку , расположенную между несколькими линиями обороны. Северо-западнее канала ВСУ обустроили сеть опорных пунктов. Вероятнее всего, ВС РФ будут применять тактику малых и сверхмалых штурмовых групп, не привлекая к участку значительного внимания противника, сконцентрировав ресурсы для продвижения на более перспективных участках. 📌 В целом обстановка для ВСУ на направлении продолжает ухудшаться. После утраты ключевых высот на канале Северский Донец — Донбасс и освобождения Рай-Александровки ВС РФ смогут подтянуть к селу артиллерию и экипажи БЛА для обстрелов всей Славянско-Краматорской агломерации . Скорее всего противник попытается провести несколько локальных контратак в попытке сорвать эти намерения. Однако в условиях почти полностью перекрытой логистики сделать это ВСУ с каждым днем будет все сложнее. Если у Вас есть дополнения по обстановке, Вы хотите, чтобы мы подсветили успехи Вашего подразделения, — Вы всегда можете написать нам в бот обратной связи @rybar_feedback_bot 📍 Карта в высоком разрешении 📍 English version 📍 Онлайн-карты доступны по подписке на map.rybar.ru #дайджест #карта #Краматорск #Россия #Славянск #Украина ✈ RU | ✈ EN | ✉ MAX ✉️ VK | ✉️ RuTube | ✉️ ОК | ✉️ Дзен 💸 Поддержать нас
text_zh: 📝 北顿涅茨河—顿巴斯运河附近的战斗 📝 在斯拉维扬斯克方向，通往克拉马托尔斯克集聚区的战斗仍在继续。俄罗斯军队正在该方向的两翼挤压乌克兰武装部队的阵地，试图绕过敌方的主要防御区和沿M-03公路建立的据点。 ➡️ 在皮斯库诺夫卡至克里瓦亚卢卡一线，双方正在争夺高地控制权以及多尔吉森林周边地区。俄军在此处的稳固驻扎将使其能够集结小型突击小组，以推进至尼古拉耶夫卡，并从北部绕过赖-亚历山德罗夫卡。 ➡️ 赖-亚历山德罗夫卡本身也在进行战斗。乌克兰方面散布恐慌性消息，称俄军几乎已经进入该定居点中心，但目前尚无客观证据证实这一点。 ➡️ 在南翼，小型突击小组正在迪布罗瓦以西的北顿涅茨河—顿巴斯运河沿岸的林带中巩固阵地。尤里·波多利亚卡报道称，位于多条防线之间的邻近马利诺夫卡已开始战斗。在运河西北部，乌克兰武装部队建立了一个据点网络。俄军极有可能将采用小型和超小型突击小组战术，在不引起敌方对该区域过多关注的情况下，集中资源在更有前景的区域推进。 📌 总的来说，乌克兰武装部队在该方向的局势持续恶化。在失去北顿涅茨河—顿巴斯运河的关键高地并解放赖-亚历山德罗夫卡后，俄军将能够把火炮和无人机组调至该村，以炮击整个斯拉维扬斯克-克拉马托尔斯克集聚区。敌方很可能会尝试进行几次局部反击，试图破坏这些意图。然而，在物流几乎完全中断的情况下，乌克兰武装部队每天要做到这一点将变得越来越困难。如果您有关于局势的补充信息，或者希望我们报道您所在部队的战果，您可以随时通过反馈机器人 @rybar_feedback_bot 联系我们。 📍 高分辨率地图 📍 英文版本 📍 在线地图可通过订阅 map.rybar.ru 获取 #摘要 #地图 #克拉马托尔斯克 #俄罗斯 #斯拉维扬斯克 #乌克兰 ✈ RU | ✈ EN | ✉ MAX ✉️ VK | ✉️ RuTube | ✉️ OK | ✉️ Dzen 💸 支持我们

text: OSINTdefender According to Fox News, U.S. President Donald J. Trump unilaterally cancelled White House Special Envoy to the Middle East Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner’s trip to Islamabad, Pakistan, saying We have all the cards. They can call us anytime they want, but you're not going to be making any more 18 hour flights to sit around talking about nothing.” tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 据福克斯新闻报道，美国总统唐纳德·J·特朗普单方面取消了白宫中东特使史蒂夫·威特科夫和贾里德·库什纳前往巴基斯坦伊斯兰堡的行程，称“我们掌握了所有筹码。他们随时可以给我们打电话，但你们不会再进行18小时的飞行去坐着谈论毫无意义的事情了。” 推文

text: Faytuks News BREAKING: President Trump tells Fox News that he has unilaterally cancelled Witkoff and Kushner’s trip to Pakistan to meet with the Iranians. tweet
text_zh: Faytuks News 快讯：特朗普告诉福克斯新闻，他已单方面取消了威特科夫和库什纳前往巴基斯坦与伊朗人会面的行程。 推文

text: BREAKING: Trump says he canceled Witkoff and Kushner’s Pakistan trip to meet Iranians, arguing the U.S. “has all the cards” and won’t send officials on long flights for unproductive talks. Source: Fox News
text_zh: 快讯：特朗普表示他取消了威特科夫和库什纳前往巴基斯坦与伊朗人会面的行程，并辩称美国“掌握了所有筹码”，不会派遣官员进行长途飞行去进行无果的会谈。 来源：福克斯新闻

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 According to Multiple media outlets the ISF carried out a raid to arrest a generator owner in Beirut following his failure to comply with the regulations imposed by EDL (Electricte du Liban). The ISF shot warning shots in the air which sparked a wave of anger among the residents of Beirut condemning the action being used. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 据多家媒体报道，黎巴嫩国内安全部队（ISF）在贝鲁特对一名发电机所有者进行了突击逮捕，原因是其未能遵守黎巴嫩电力公司（EDL）实施的规定。ISF向空中鸣枪示警，引发了贝鲁特居民的愤怒，他们谴责这种执法行为。@wfwitness

text: Event in Bint Jbeil might be an Israeli demolition A demolition of lives and past. Demolition of people's homes and everything

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧 A Statement has been issued by the residents of Ras Beirut: The residents of Ras Beirut strongly condemn the dangerous practices that took place in the Saqiet al-Janzir neighborhood, including gunfire, a mafia-style raid, the terrorizing of civilians…" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 Footage from Hamra, Beirut. @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Fox News: U.S. President Trump has unilaterally cancelled the planned trip of envoys Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner to Pakistan for talks with Iran, a Fox News reporter said after speaking with the president. “I told my people a little while ago they were getting ready to leave, and I said, 'Nope, you're not going to make an 18-hour flight to go there. We have all the cards.' They can call us anytime they want, but you're not going to be making any more 18-hour flights to sit around and talk about nothing," Trump said. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 福克斯新闻：福克斯新闻记者在与美国总统特朗普交谈后表示，特朗普已单方面取消了特使史蒂夫·威特科夫（Steve Witkoff）和贾里德·库什纳（Jared Kushner）原定前往巴基斯坦与伊朗进行会谈的行程。特朗普说：“我刚才告诉我的团队，他们正准备出发，我说，‘不，你们不会去进行18小时的飞行。我们掌握着所有的筹码。’他们随时可以打电话给我们，但你们不会再进行18小时的飞行去坐着谈论毫无意义的事情了。” @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 Trump told Fox News he canceled Witkoff and Kushner’s trip to Islamabad 'I said, 'nope, you’re not making 18-hour flight to go there. We have all the cards. You’re not going to be making any more 18-hour flights to sit around talking about nothing' 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 特朗普告诉福克斯新闻，他取消了威特科夫和库什纳前往伊斯兰堡的行程，“我说，‘不，你们不会去进行18小时的飞行。我们掌握着所有的筹码。你们不会再进行18小时的飞行去坐着谈论毫无意义的事情了’” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇴🇲 The Iranian delegation has departed Islamabad after meeting with senior Pakistani officials to discuss their demands for peace negotiations with the U.S. They will likely fly to Muscat next to meet with Omani officials. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇴🇲 伊朗代表团在与巴基斯坦高级官员会面讨论其与美国进行和平谈判的要求后，已离开伊斯兰堡。他们接下来可能会飞往马斯喀特与阿曼官员会面。@wfwitness

text: New attacks in Jemejmieh The IDF is attacking houses and populated towns.
text_zh: 杰梅吉耶（Jemejmieh）发生新袭击，以色列国防军正在袭击房屋和人口稠密的城镇。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 The Israeli military said it continued striking alleged Hezbollah infrastructure in southern Lebanon, targeting buildings allegedly used by the Radwan Force and a weapons storage warehouse south of the forward defence line. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 以色列军方称，其继续打击黎巴嫩南部所谓的真主党基础设施，目标是据称被拉德万部队（Radwan Force）使用的建筑物以及前沿防线以南的一个武器仓库。 @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇦 Dnepropetrovsk has been under the attack of missiles and drones for over 20 hours, the local administration reports 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇦 据当地政府报告，第聂伯罗彼得罗夫斯克已遭受导弹和无人机袭击超过20小时 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Israeli airstrikes targeted Safad al-Batikh, southern Lebanon. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 以色列空袭了黎巴嫩南部的萨法德·巴蒂赫（Safad al-Batikh）。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸🇵🇰 Axios: Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi was not expected to wait in Pakistan for the U.S. delegation, so his departure carries no special significance. The plan was for him to continue to Oman and Russia, and possibly return to Pakistan early…" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 Al Arabiya: Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi will return to Islamabad tomorrow. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸🇵🇰 Axios：伊朗外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格齐（Abbas Araghchi）预计不会在巴基斯坦等待美国代表团，因此他的离开并无特殊意义。原计划是他将继续前往阿曼和俄罗斯，并可能在早些时候返回巴基斯坦……” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 阿拉伯电视台（Al Arabiya）：伊朗外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格齐将于明天返回伊斯兰堡。 @wfwitness

text: Disclose.tv JUST IN - Iran’s foreign minister leaves Islamabad — AP tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 快讯 - 伊朗外交部长离开伊斯兰堡 — 美联社推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧 A Statement has been issued by the residents of Ras Beirut: The residents of Ras Beirut strongly condemn the dangerous practices that took place in the Saqiet al-Janzir neighborhood, including gunfire, a mafia-style raid, the terrorizing of civilians…" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 Lebanese Prime minister Nawaf Salam released a statement condemning the incident: What happened in saheit il Janzeer is an "act of violence" by members of a security agency against civilians, including shooting and terrorizing citizens. Such actions are unacceptable, regardless of the reasons behind them. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧 贝鲁特拉斯（Ras Beirut）居民发表声明：贝鲁特拉斯居民强烈谴责萨基特·詹齐尔（Saqiet al-Janzir）社区发生的危险行为，包括开枪、黑手党式的突袭、恐吓平民……” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 黎巴嫩总理纳瓦夫·萨拉姆（Nawaf Salam）发表声明谴责该事件：发生在萨基特·詹齐尔的事情是安全机构成员针对平民的“暴力行为”，包括开枪和恐吓公民。无论出于何种原因，此类行为都是不可接受的。 @wfwitness

text: Unfortunately there are casualties
text_zh: 不幸的是，有人员伤亡
